name: diff-block
description: Code diff block — highlights + additions and - removals with green/red backgrounds
whenToUse: Use to show what changed in code — before/after a refactor, migration steps, or patch explanations.
whenNotToUse: Do not use to show two alternatives side by side — use CodeGroup. Not for prose changes.
example:
<DiffBlock>
  {`- const result = items.filter(x => x.active)
+ const result = items.filter(({ active }) => active)`}
</DiffBlock>
